LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFFS RUSSELL BRIMER AND DEFENDANT, DOLLAR EMPIRE, LLC'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS THE REFORMULATION AND WARNING PROVISIONS ARE REASONABLE AND COMPLIANT WITH THE LAW. THE FEES AND PENALTY PROVISIONS ARE ALSO REASONABLE. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189

MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. BRIAN C. JOHNSON OF THE CHANLER GROUP, TEL. NO. (510) 848-8880 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF AND MOVING PARTY;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF RUSSELL BRIMER AND DEFENDANT, DOLLAR EMPIRE, LLC'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment IS GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS THE REFORMULATION AND WARNING PROVISIONS ARE REASONABLE AND COMPLIANT WITH THE LAW. THE FEES AND PENALTY PROVISIONS ARE ALSO REASONABLE. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =(301/PJB)= (301/PJB)
